prompt: 用 idea-flow 帮我整理一下：我想做一个 CLI 工具，把 markdown 文件批量转成 PDF，支持自定义样式。

assertions.text: Response asks at least one question to the user instead of directly generating a solution
Response asks only ONE main question (not multiple questions bundled together)
Response probes the problem (who uses it, current workaround, why now) rather than jumping to implementation
Response does NOT create WORK.md, repo structure, or task list in the first turn
Response explains why the question matters for the subsequent plan
